title: Learning Entry v2
description: A single learning entry (self or attribution) appended by log-learning.py. schema_version, id, and timestamp are injected server-side; callers must not supply them.

type.description: 'self' for intra-skill learnings; 'attribution' for cross-skill escape-point findings.

reported_by.description: Slug of the skill/agent that captured this entry.

improves.description: Slug of the skill/agent/process/contract to improve. Null when attribution is uncertain.

improves_type.description: Category of the thing being improved.

cause.description: Open-vocab cause label. Known values: requirement_lost_between_docs, context_lost_in_handoff, requirement_never_elicited, intentionally_descoped, data_contract_gap, general_best_practice, other.

cause_label.description: Required non-null snake_case string when cause=='other'; null otherwise.

why_missed.description: Why the problem was not caught earlier in the pipeline.

lesson.description: General reusable rule that must hold beyond this run.

fix.description: Concrete edit to a skill or script that would prevent recurrence.

source.description: 'transcript' for session transcript spans; 'artifact' for seed/tasks/diff/SKILL.md.

ref.description: Path or URL to the source file.

quote.description: Verbatim or near-verbatim excerpt confirming the anchor.

evidence.description: Discrete quoted anchors from transcript or artifact files.

confidence.description: 'confirmed' when evidence is direct; 'candidate' when the link is inferred.

status.description: Lifecycle state. Optional; set by improve-skill when fix is applied.

examples.problem: Did not check for jq availability before piping.
examples.why_missed: Skill assumed jq is always present.
examples.lesson: Check for jq with 'which jq' before using it; fall back to python -m json.tool.
examples.fix: Add jq check at start of any step that pipes to jq.

evidence.quote: Bash tool returned 'command not found: jq'

examples.problem: Acceptance criterion from seed was not carried into tasks file.
examples.why_missed: to-tasks did not cross-reference the seed for implicit constraints.
examples.lesson: to-tasks must check seed for criteria not yet in the PRD.
examples.fix: Add a seed cross-reference step to to-tasks SKILL.md.

evidence.quote: criterion X is listed under decisions
